name: CallRail Call Tracking API
what_it_does: Call tracking and conversation intelligence platform with REST API — attributing phone call leads to marketing campaigns via dynamic number insertion, recording and transcribing calls, scoring leads with AI, and integrating call data with CRM and analytics platforms for full marketing attribution.
use_cases: Querying call attribution data by campaign, keyword, or source for marketing ROI reporting
Pulling call recordings and AI transcripts for lead quality analysis via API
Syncing call lead data to CRM (Salesforce, HubSpot) via webhook for deal creation
Integrating call conversion data with Google Ads for offline conversion import
Automating call tracking number assignment for new campaigns via API
not_for: Outbound sales dialing (CallRail is for inbound call tracking)
Call center routing and IVR (use Twilio or Five9 for contact center)
B2B companies with no phone call conversion channel
best_when: A marketing team for a local service business, healthcare provider, or automotive dealership needs to attribute phone call leads to digital marketing spend and understand what campaigns drive calls.
avoid_when: Your business model doesn't involve phone call conversions, you primarily track online-only conversions, or you need outbound sales dialing.

auth.notes: API key from CallRail account settings. Passed as Authorization header (Token token=API_KEY format). Company ID or account ID required in URL path. No OAuth2 or scopes. Webhook for call events (start, end, recording, transcription). Sub-account API keys supported for agencies.

pricing.paid_tiers: Call Tracking $45/month; Analytics Suite $95/month; Both packages custom
pricing.notes: Atlanta-based company. Founded 2011. Raised $30M. 200,000+ businesses. Call Tracking + Conversation Intelligence suite. Dynamic Number Insertion (DNI) JavaScript snippet required for website tracking. Google Ads, Facebook, and GA4 integrations for offline conversion tracking. Strong in local services verticals.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API v3 for accounts, companies, calls, text messages, form submissions, trackers, and reports. Token auth format (not Bearer). Good developer documentation at apidocs.callrail.com. Company ID in URL path for multi-account agency use. Recordings and transcripts via pre-signed URLs. 100 req/min rate limit documented.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: All call data reads are fully idempotent. Tracker configuration reads idempotent. Report queries idempotent by date range. Call recordings idempotent by call ID.
known_agent_gotchas: Auth header format is 'Token token=YOUR_KEY' not 'Bearer YOUR_KEY'
Company ID required in URL path — different from account ID
DNI JavaScript snippet required on website for source attribution — API cannot set this up
Recording download URLs are time-limited pre-signed URLs
HIPAA BAA required for healthcare call recording — sign before enabling transcription

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. HIPAA compliant (with BAA). GDPR and CCPA compliant. US data residency. Token-based auth. Call recordings contain PII — implement HIPAA-grade access controls for healthcare. TCPA consent required for recording callers — implement disclosure.
